title: centaurium spicatum subsp. japonicum
intro: Centaurium spicatum subsp. japonicum, also known as Japanese centaury or Japanese centaurium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Centaurium spicatum subsp. japonicum is often prepared in teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, coughs, and digestive issues.
